Prior vs Posterior — by parameter

Each parameter: its identification equation, then one panel per activity measure (data), with models overlaid by colour. Dashed = prior · filled = posterior · red dotted = 0.

πt = α πt−1 + (1−α) Etπt+1 + κt xt − θt Nt + et     κt = κ0 + δ Nt    θt = θ0 + γ Nt
Nobst = Nt + Nt + νt  ·  Nt = ρ1 Nt−1 + ρ2 Nt−2 + ut  ·  Nt = n + Nt−1 + εt  ·  xt = φ1 xt−1 + ζt

N = competition trend  ·  N = deviation from trend (“gap”)  ·  bold = the parameter each block is about

Tip: click any panel to enlarge it.
